pageTitle: Special Character Copier - Arrows, Math Symbols & Copyright Signs | GetNiftyKit
metaDescription: Search 170+ special characters by meaning — arrows, math symbols, currency signs, roman numerals — and copy them with one click. No sign-up required.
softwareAppDescription: A free web tool to search special characters like arrows, math symbols, and currency signs by name and copy them to your clipboard with one click.
subtitle: Search special characters by meaning and copy them with one click
taglineExtra: 170+ characters shown at a large, readable size — so look-alikes like × and x are never mixed up.
infoIntroP: Special Character Copier is a tool for finding any of 170+ special characters — arrows, math symbols, currency signs, stars and shapes, punctuation, roman numerals, circled letters, and Greek letters — by name or meaning, and copying them to your clipboard with a single click. Unlike most symbol pickers, characters here are shown at a large size, so look-alikes such as × and x are never confused. Every search and copy happens instantly in your browser, with no sign-up or installation required.
infoHowtoP: Type a character's name or a related keyword into the search box — for example, searching "arrow" brings up directional arrows, and "copyright" brings up the © sign. If there are too many results to scan, use the category tabs (arrows, math symbols, currency, and more) to narrow things down. Click any character to copy it straight to your clipboard.
infoUseCases: Adding arrows, check marks, or similar marks to a document or slide deck
Marking currency symbols in a price list or product description
Inserting math or Greek letter symbols into a paper or report
Numbering a list with circled numbers (①②③)

faq.q: Are these symbols free to use?
faq.a: Yes. Every character here is a standard Unicode text character, so it isn't subject to copyright and can be used freely.

faq.q: Can I search in other languages?
faq.a: Yes. You can search character names in English, Korean, Japanese, or Chinese.

faq.q: Do I need to sign up?
faq.a: No. You can search and copy symbols immediately, no account required.

privacyNote: This tool processes every search and copy locally in your browser. Your search terms and personal data are never sent to or stored on a server.
